---
name: rpg-data
description: "Use when: modeling, searching, or analyzing RPG sector/world data, including Traveller, sector files, UWP, and world attributes. Covers data modeling, search queries, and RPG-specific conventions."
---

# RPG Data Modeling and Search Skill

**Use for:**
- Modeling RPG sector/world data (Traveller, UWP, sector files)
- Searching or filtering worlds, sectors, or regions
- Explaining RPG data conventions (UWP, PBG, Allegiance, etc.)
- Building or troubleshooting search queries for RPG data

**Not for:**
- General database design (use db-design skill)
- Non-RPG data (use appropriate domain skill)
